notes: harness/vectors is the authoritative Nowhere 1.5.1 corpus
nowhere-go/testdata/vectors is a byte-for-byte module-local copy written by export-rust-vectors.sh
complete wire hex tables must not be maintained by hand
1.5 auth is connection-bound: tag = HMAC-SHA256(auth_key, transport || exporter || session_id)[0:16]
1.5 flow header is 5 bytes (flags + u32 BE flow_id); flow_id is uint32, not uint64
1.5 setup result is a single byte (0..7); no magic/version prefix
1.5 UoT is u16 BE length + payload (no type byte)
1.5 datagram DATA/CLOSE are 5-byte headers, FRAGMENT is 13 bytes
